children.name:
Expect $(`~enter-seed-words-layout`).$(`~instructions`).$(`-ios class chain:**/XCUIElementTypeStaticText`) to have text containing

Expected: "Type your recovery seed here. You may either enter one word at a time or all at once separated by spaces."
Received: "Type your recovery seed here. Each phrase should go into their respective box. Alternatively you can simply copy past your recovery seed in here."
Enter Recovery Seed - Validate Screen Contents

Expect $(`[name="enter-seed-words-layout"]`).$(`[name="instructions"]`).$(`//Text[contains(@Name, "Type your recovery seed")]`) to have text containing

Expected: "Type your recovery seed here. You may either enter one word at a time or all at once separated by spaces."
Received: "Type your recovery seed here. Each phrase should go into their respective box. Alternatively you can simply copy past your recovery seed in here."
Enter Recovery Seed - Validate Screen Contents

Expect $(`[name="free-space-current-size"]`).$(`<Text>[2]`) to have text containing

Expected: "0 bytes"
Received: "7.6 KB"
Files - File Size Indicators without files shows GB Max and 0 bytes as current space
